scope.summary: Load the account's friends/contacts (get_all_friends) and render them in a scrollable, A–Z grouped Danh bạ pane; clicking a contact opens a DM thread.
goals: zalo/ list_contacts maps zca-rust get_all_friends User into core Contact DTOs (sorted, zca-rust confined to zalo)
command/ list_contacts reuses the stored session and returns non-secret Contact DTOs
A Danh bạ pane lists contacts with avatars, search, A–Z groups, and scrolls; selecting a contact starts a chat
nonGoals: Deriving the recent-conversation list from server history (still event-derived)

acceptance.description: command/ list_contacts reuses the session and returns Contact DTOs; build compiles.
The Danh bạ pane renders + scrolls the full list; real browser validation passes.
Live: list_contacts loads the real friend list, every entry has a uid + display name.
